name: Mobico Group PLC
description: Mobico Group PLC, formerly known as National Express Group, is a prominent British multinational public transport company headquartered in Birmingham, England. The company operates as an international shared mobility provider, delivering a wide range of bus, coach, and rail services across the United Kingdom, North America, continental Europe, North Africa, and the Middle East. Committed to sustainable development, Mobico Group focuses on providing critical transport solutions that address modern societal challenges while maintaining a diverse portfolio of transit operations across multiple global markets.
